node.text: Evan is considering physical therapy for his knee and in the meantime is keeping it low-key and swimming to stay active.

node.text: Evan twisted his knee last Friday and is finding it tough to stay consistent with his usual fitness routine.

node.text: Evan messed up their knee playing basketball and is doing easy exercises to keep it strong.

node.text: Evan has been dealing with health issues lately that have made him appreciate good moments more.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "keep busy healing knee") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.59)

node.text: Evan has been working on prioritizing his health for two years, with ups and downs.
Evan went through a phase two years ago where he changed his diet and started walking regularly.
Evan recommended a nearby lake for Sam to explore with many trails nearby.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "healing knee activity") on Session 9 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Evan is motivated to stay healthy by his family and uses a tool that tracks his progress well.
Evan emphasizes celebrating small victories and supporting Sam in moving forward.
Evan believes progress takes time and advises Sam to take things one step at a time.
